languages.text: "Мой единственный сын, он служит бойцом в пустотном отряде. Я сама сказала ему держать позицию... мой бедный Гнотек". {n}Хрипит женщина из-за спин специалистов.{/n}
"My only son, he's serving in a void unit. I was the one who told him to go there... my poor Gnotec," {n}rasps the woman from behind the medicae officers.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Мой единственный сын, он служит бойцом в пустотном отряде. Я сама сказала ему держать позицию... мой бедный Гнотек". {n}Хрипит женщина из-за спин специалистов.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "My only son, he's serving in a void unit. I was the one who told him to go there... my poor Gnotec," {n}rasps the woman from behind the medicae officers.{/n}
"My only son, he's serving as a fighter in a void unit. I was the one who told him to go there... my poor Gnotec," {n}rasps the woman from behind the medicae officers.{/n}
"My only son, he's serving as a fighter in a void unit. I was the one who told him to go there... my poor Gnotec," {n}rasps the woman from behind the medicae officers.{/n}
"My only son, he's serving in a void unit. I was the one who told him to go there... my poor Gnotec," {n}rasps the woman from behind the medicae officers.{/n}

languages.text: "Mein einziger Sohn, er dient in einer Leereneinheit. Ich sagte ihm, er solle sich dort melden ... mein armer Gnotec", {n}ächzt die Frau hinter den Medicae-Offizieren.{/n}
languages.original_text: "My only son, he's serving in a void unit. I was the one who told him to go there... my poor Gnotec," {n}rasps the woman from behind the medicae officers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Mein einziger Sohn, er dient in einer Leereneinheit. Ich sagte ihm, er solle sich dort melden ... mein armer Gnotec", {n}ächzt die Frau hinter den Medicae-Offizieren.{/n}

languages.text: « Mon fils unique, qui sert dans une unité de cosmosoldats. C'est moi qui lui ai conseillé d'y aller... mon pauvre Gnotec, » {n}gémit la femme postée derrière les officiers de medicae.{/n}
languages.original_text: "My only son, he's serving in a void unit. I was the one who told him to go there... my poor Gnotec," {n}rasps the woman from behind the medicae officers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Mon fils unique, qui sert dans une unité de cosmosoldats. C'est moi qui lui ai conseillé d'y aller... mon pauvre Gnotec, » {n}gémit la femme postée derrière les officiers de medicae.{/n}

languages.text: “他是我的独子，在虚空小队当兵。是我让他去的……我可怜的诺泰克，”{n}那个女人站在医疗官身后，声音沙哑地说道。{/n}
languages.original_text: "My only son, he's serving in a void unit. I was the one who told him to go there... my poor Gnotec," {n}rasps the woman from behind the medicae officers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “他是我的独子，在虚空小队当兵。是我让他去的……我可怜的诺泰克，”{n}那个女人站在医疗官身后，声音沙哑地说道。{/n}

languages.text: «Mi único hijo sirve en una unidad del vacío. Fui yo la que le dijo que se dedicara a eso... mi pobre Gnotec». {n}La mujer prácticamente jadea desde detrás de los oficiales medicae.{/n}
languages.original_text: "My only son, he's serving in a void unit. I was the one who told him to go there... my poor Gnotec," {n}rasps the woman from behind the medicae officers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Mi único hijo sirve en una unidad del vacío. Fui yo la que le dijo que se dedicara a eso... mi pobre Gnotec». {n}La mujer prácticamente jadea desde detrás de los oficiales medicae.{/n}

languages.text: "私の一人息子は、虚空部隊の戦闘員として勤務している。私自身は彼に自分のポジションを守るように言ったのですが...かわいそうなグノテックです"{n}専門家たちの背後から、喘ぎ声を上げる女性。{/n}
languages.original_text: "My only son, he's serving as a fighter in the void squad. I myself told him to hold his position... my poor Gnotek." {n}A wheezing woman from behind the backs of the specialists.{/n}

languages.text: "Tek oğlum, o bir uçsuz biriminde görev yapıyor. Oraya gitmesini söyleyen bendim... Zavallı Gnotec'im." {n}Kadın, sıhhiye subaylarının arkasında hırıldıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "My only son, he's serving in a void unit. I was the one who told him to go there... my poor Gnotec," {n}rasps the woman from behind the medicae officers.{/n}
